sample_info.company: 华中科技大学同济医学院附属协和医院

snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6661（3336/5008）、0.5198（63076/121350）、0.5131（129014/251424）、0.6003（18792/31304）、0.7595（82490/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道为Benign（ID=183700，可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录10次EPCAM蛋白第115位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T记录10次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.6661(3336/5008), 0.5198(63076/121350), 0.5131(129014/251424), 0.6003(18792/31304), 0.7595(82490/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as Benign in the ClinVar database(ID=183700, review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the EPCAM protein position 115, of which the mutant M115T is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6661（3336/5008）、0.5198（63076/121350）、0.5131（129014/251424）、0.6003（18792/31304）、0.7593（58806/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录3次EPCAM蛋白第115位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T记录3次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.6661(3336/5008), 0.5198(63076/121350), 0.5131(129014/251424), 0.6003(18792/31304), 0.7595(82490/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the EPCAM protein position 115, of which the mutant M115T is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第115位氨基酸由蛋氨酸突变为苏氨酸。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 115th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Methionine to Threonine.
snvindel.gene_function: EPCAM基因属于抑癌基因，编码上皮细胞黏附分子，是一种介导细胞间黏附、调节细胞增殖和分化的糖蛋白（PMID: 23618806）。

snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6284（3147/5008）、0.5047（40457/80162）、0.4735（101041/213394）、0.5545（17357/31300）、0.7444（80834/108590）；ClinVar数据库报道为Benign（ID=36573，可靠度为三颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.6284(3147/5008), 0.5047(40457/80162), 0.4735(101041/213394), 0.5545(17357/31300), 0.7444(80834/108590) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as Benign in the ClinVar database(ID=36573, review status: three stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6284（3147/5008）、0.5047（40457/80162）、0.4735（101041/213394）、0.5545（17357/31300）、0.7448（57670/77432）；COSMIC数据库无记录。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.6284(3147/5008), 0.5047(40457/80162), 0.4735(101041/213394), 0.5545(17357/31300), 0.7444(80834/108590) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为内含子区突变。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is located in the intron of the gene.
snvindel.gene_function: MSH2基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白与MSH6蛋白、MSH3蛋白形成异二聚体，即MutS-α和MutS-β错配修复（MMR）复合物（PMID: 7973733, PMID: 8252616）。两种复合物都参与了对错配碱基对的识别，形成DNA-MutS复合物，之后向MMR机制的其他组件发出信号以切除异常核苷酸。

snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.00001857（2/107706），1000G、ExAC、gnomAD数据库无记录（iJGVD数据库数据未通过过滤标准）；ClinVar数据库报道为Likely benign（ID=3072692，可靠度为一颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.00001857(2/107706) in the iJGVD database, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC or gnomAD databases(data in the iJGVD database fail the filter); this variant is reported as Likely benign in the ClinVar database (ID=3072692, review status: one star). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function: PMS2基因属于抑癌基因，编码一种核酸内切酶。编码蛋白在错配修复（MMR）途径中起重要作用，并与微卫星不稳定性（MSI）（PMID: 30121009）和基因组稳定性（PMID: 31747945）有关。

snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.02636（132/5008）、0.03933（2472/62852）、0.06931（10016/144514）、0.09616（2260/23502）、0.005506（598/108604）（gnomADe数据库数据未通过过滤标准）；ClinVar数据库报道为Conflicting interpretations of pathogenicity（Uncertain significance,Benign,Likely benign）（ID=198429，可靠度为一颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the COSMIC database records 5 times of amino acid change at the PMS2 protein position 143, of which the mutant I143= is recorded 5 times. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a synonymous mutation.
snvindel.gene_function: PMS2基因属于抑癌基因，编码一种核酸内切酶。编码蛋白在错配修复（MMR）途径中起重要作用，并与微卫星不稳定性（MSI）（PMID: 30121009）和基因组稳定性（PMID: 31747945）有关。

snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.07568（379/5008）、0.07818（9003/115162）、0.07155（17574/245616）、0.08039（2522/31372）、0.09388（10196/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道为Benign（ID=41716，可靠度为三颗星）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.07568(379/5008), 0.07818(9003/115162), 0.07155(17574/245616), 0.08039(2522/31372), 0.09388(10196/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as Benign in the ClinVar database(ID=41716, review status: three stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.07568（379/5008）、0.07818（9003/115162）、0.07155（17574/245616）、0.08039（2522/31372）、0.09318（7216/77444）；CKB数据库报道为loss of function，OncoKB数据库报道为Oncogenic，COSMIC数据库记录6次PMS2蛋白第20位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q记录4次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.07568(379/5008), 0.07818(9003/115162), 0.07155(17574/245616), 0.08039(2522/31372), 0.09388(10196/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 12 times of amino acid change at the PMS2 protein position 20, of which the mutant R20Q is recorded 10 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第20位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 20th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Glutamine.
snvindel.gene_function: PMS2基因属于抑癌基因，编码一种核酸内切酶。编码蛋白在错配修复（MMR）途径中起重要作用，并与微卫星不稳定性（MSI）（PMID: 30121009）和基因组稳定性（PMID: 31747945）有关。

snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.5429（2719/5008）、0.66（79805/120924）、0.6682（167398/250534）、0.6207（19434/31312）、0.6496（50303/77442）；FLOSSIES数据库报道有8372位60岁以上且没有确诊癌症的女性携带该变异；ClinVar数据库报道为Benign（ID=12351，可靠度为两颗星）。Cancer Hotspots数据库无记录。基于预测工具BayesDel及aGVGD认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.5429(2719/5008), 0.66(79805/120924), 0.6682(167398/250534), 0.6207(19434/31312), 0.6522(70826/108602) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the FLOSSIES database reports 8372 women over 60 years of age with no diagnosed cancer carrying this variant; this variant is reported as Benign in the ClinVar database(ID=12351, review status: two stars). The Cancer Hotspots database has no record for this variant. Based on the prediction tools REVEL and aGVGD, this variant is considered neutral, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.5429（2719/5008）、0.66（79805/120924）、0.6682（167398/250534）、0.6207（19434/31312）、0.6496（50303/77442）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录268次TP53蛋白第72位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R记录227次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.5429(2719/5008), 0.66(79805/120924), 0.6682(167398/250534), 0.6207(19434/31312), 0.6522(70826/108602) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as unknown  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 247 times of amino acid change at the TP53 protein position 72, of which the mutant P72R is recorded 204 times. The Cancer Hotspots database has no record for this variant. Based on the prediction tools REVEL and aGVGD, this variant is considered neutral, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第72位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为精氨酸。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 72nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Arginine.
snvindel.gene_function: TP53基因属于抑癌基因（PMID: 30562755），编码蛋白参与细胞周期停滞和凋亡，是肿瘤中最常发生突变的基因（PMID: 10065147, PMID: 22713868）。

msi.variant_desc_cn: 微卫星（Microsatellite）又称简单重复序列（SSR），是指遍布于人类基因组中的短串联重复序列，一般由1-6个核苷酸组成。DNA复制时，肿瘤细胞内的微卫星由于重复单位的插入或缺失而造成的微卫星长度的变化，称为微卫星不稳定性（Microsatellite Instability, MSI）。大量研究表明，MSI是由错配修复（mismatch repair，MMR）基因突变或功能缺陷引起的（PMID: 25701956）。MSI在多种癌种中被发现，包括子宫内膜癌、结直肠癌和胃腺癌等。据报道，10%-15%的散发性结直肠癌患者存在MSI（PMID: 15528785），NCCN指南明确推荐所有结直肠癌患者均需考虑做MSI或MMR检测。临床上也已将MSI作为结直肠癌及其他实体瘤预后和制定辅助治疗方案的重要分子标志物。
msi.variant_desc_en: Microsatellite, also known as simple repeat sequence (SSR), refers to the short tandem repeat sequences throughout the human genome, generally composed of 1-6 nucleotides. During DNA replication, Microsatellite Instability (MSI) is defined as the change in microsatellite length caused by the insertion or deletion of repeat units in tumor cells. Numerous studies have shown that MSI is caused by mismatch repair (MMR) gene mutations or functional defects (PMID: 25701956). MSI has been found in a variety of cancers, including endometrial cancer, colorectal cancer, and gastric adenocarcinoma. MSI has been reported in 10%-15% of sporadic colorectal cancer patients (PMID: 15528785), and the NCCN guidelines clearly recommend that all patients with colorectal cancer should be considered for MSI or MMR testing. MSI has also been regarded as an important molecular marker for the prognosis and adjuvant treatment of colorectal cancer and other solid tumors.
